title: Private Consumption per Housing and Heating Categories by Municipality and Month (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Monthly consumption of private households by housing and heating categories by municipality.

The dataset is updated between the 9th and 15th the following month.
**Housing categories** are created based on Bygnings- og Boligregistret (BBR)'s building usage codes [BygAnvendelse](https://teknik.bbr.dk/kodelister/0/1/0/BygAnvendelse) whereas **heating categories** are based on Bygnings- og Boligregistret (BBR)'s heating installation codes [Varmeinstallation](https://instruks.bbr.dk/varmeinstallation1/0/31). Heating installations are grouped in two categories: 'Elvarme eller varmepumpe' (Electric heating or heat pump) and 'Andet' (Other).

To comply with laws regarding the protection of private data, **methods for anonymizing data 
have been applied**. This dataset uses number and dominance as a criterion for confidentiality. The number criteria is set to 20 and the dominance criteria is set to 60 percent per hour for 3 hours straight. 
In case of the criteria being exceeded, the dataset will combine data columns or aggregate data columns to a high level in the following order: 
1. Housing categories being combined
2. Heating categories being combined
3. Municipalities being combined  and/or aggregated
4. Time being combined and/or aggregated
